stemHtml:
Refer to Jeppesen GSPRM Training Route Manual - Chart "E LO 2".
An aircraft in flight is required to find its position with two DME readings. Dublin DME (DUB, 53°30’N, 006°18’W) reads 38 NM, Belfast DME (BEL, 54°39’N, 006°13’W) reads 46 NM. Find its position, considering that the aircraft is on a heading of 270° with both readings increasing:
